prompt: Using image 1 as the base, refine its depth map to emphasize the foreground laptop and hands with the close perspective suggested by image 2. Apply a selective depth-of-field blur effect similar to the background softness in image 3, highlighting the subject.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 by refining its depth map. Adjust the perspective to emphasize the foreground laptop and the hands on its trackpad, making them appear closer and more prominent, similar to the close-up framing in image 2. Apply a selective depth-of-field blur effect to the background, mimicking the soft, diffused blur seen in image 3, ensuring the foreground laptop and hands remain sharply in focus.
